description: 5 incompatible ValidationIssue type definitions: (1) app/stores/validation.svelte.ts {id,severity,title,description}, (2) features/metadata-edit/lib/inspectorValidation.ts {field,level,message,fixable}, (3) entities/manifest/model/validation/validator.ts {id,type,severity,message,path}, (4) widgets/StatusBar/lib/statusBarHelpers.ts {id,level,message}, (5) ArchiveGrid.svelte inline {level,message}. Bridged with as-any casts.
resolution: Unify into single ValidationIssue in shared/types. Canonical shape = validator.ts version (most complete). Migrate all consumers.

description: _archived/ directory has 156K lines inflating bundle. Legacy React source still processed by build tooling unnecessarily.
resolution: Exclude _archived/ from vite/typescript compilation via tsconfig exclude and vite config. Or move outside src/. Long-term: delete once migration verified complete.

description: Feature model stubs: board-design/model/index.ts, metadata-edit/model/index.ts, staging/model/index.ts, viewer/model/index.ts all have commented-out imports or explicit not-yet-migrated stubs. View components import these models then work around missing functionality with inline implementations or silently degraded behavior.
resolution: Migrate each feature model. Prioritize by usage: viewer and metadata-edit are most user-facing. Board model blocked on board persistence decision.

description: Inspector tabs partially hollow. Annotations tab has TODO: migrate AnnotationCreateForm and AnnotationsTabPanel. Structure tab has TODO: migrate StructureTabPanel. Share button is a TODO. Visible tabs render placeholder content or empty panels.
resolution: Migrate AnnotationCreateForm, AnnotationsTabPanel, StructureTabPanel, and share button. These are user-visible gaps — tabs exist but contain nothing.

description: useImageSource hook references React useEffect pattern for blob URL cleanup — not ported to Svelte 5. Image source resolver documents the cleanup pattern but it is non-functional in Svelte context.
resolution: Port useImageSource blob URL cleanup to Svelte 5 onDestroy or $effect cleanup. Verify no blob URL leaks on component unmount.

description: index.tsx React entry point still exists at project root (219 lines). Imports React/ReactDOM, renders React.StrictMode + ErrorBoundary. Svelte app uses src/main.ts. File confuses build tooling and developers. Should be deleted or moved to _archived/.
resolution: Delete index.tsx. Verify no build config references it (vite.config.ts, package.json scripts).

description: IIIFItem.items typed as unknown[] with 15+ call sites iterating without narrowing. Should be typed union per subclass (Canvas.items = AnnotationPage[], Manifest.items = Canvas[], Collection.items = IIIFItem[], Range.items = mixed). Callers use 'as any' or unsafe chaining like (canvas as any).items?.[0]?.items?.[0]?.body.
resolution: Add type guard functions (isCanvas, isManifest, isRange) and narrow items type per guard. Or use discriminated union on IIIFItem.type field.

description: ValidationHealer has ~60 as-any casts concentrated in single module. Pattern: clone IIIF object then mutate unknown fields via (healed as any).field = value. Needs HealedIIIF type (Partial<IIIFItem> & Record<string, unknown>) to replace all casts with single typed mutation context.
resolution: Create type HealedIIIF = Partial<IIIFItem> & Record<string, unknown>. Replace all as-any casts in validationHealer.ts with typed healed object.

description: Canvas Composer is types-only — full useComposer hook deferred. composer.ts defines types but ComposerStore class blocked on ViewportStore (not yet reactive). Canvas composition features (overlay, blend, arrange) non-functional. Depends on completing ViewportStore migration.
resolution: Create ViewportStore as reactive Svelte 5 class, then implement ComposerStore. Or implement minimal subset without viewport dependency.

name: _archived/ not excluded from tsconfig or vite build
description: tsconfig.json excludes only node_modules and dist — _archived/ not listed. vite.config.ts has no exclude settings. 156K lines of legacy React source potentially processed by TypeScript compiler and bundler. Should be explicitly excluded from both compilation and bundling.

content: Canopy templates in canopyTemplates.ts contain React code as string constants (import React, useState, useEffect). These are export templates for the external Canopy documentation tool — not executable code in the app. Not a React remnant; intentional string templates for cross-tool interop.

name: React deps fully removed from package.json
description: Verified Feb 2026: no react, react-dom, react-i18next, or @types/react in package.json dependencies or devDependencies. Only React remnant is index.tsx at project root (should be deleted) and React code strings in canopyTemplates.ts (intentional, for external tool). Fragility analysis section 9 claim about react-i18next is outdated.

name: shared/ui/primitives/ does not exist
description: Verified Feb 2026: src/shared/ui/primitives/ directory does not exist. Fragility analysis section 9 claim about React primitives (Button, Card, Icon, Input) being compiled is outdated. These were either already deleted or migrated to Svelte equivalents elsewhere in the component tree.

title: Delete _archived/ React source
rationale: Zero imports from src/ confirmed. Dead code from pre-Svelte migration. 100+ files removed safely.

title: Delete root ui/primitives/ React components
rationale: 5 React .tsx components (Card, Button, Input, Icon, index) with zero src/ imports. Remnant of pre-migration layout experiment.

title: Remove IngestWorkerPool stub
rationale: All methods threw 'not yet implemented'. USE_WORKER_INGEST=false hardcoded in constants. Removed dead if-branch in StagingWorkbench and vi.mock stubs in 2 test files. Deleted ingestWorkerPool.ts.

content: 7c audit: IIIFItem/IIIFCanvas/IIIFManifest/NormalizedState/Action types all canonical in src/shared/types/. No duplicate declarations. ValidationIssue unification deferred to V6.
